lyrics.title: Walk on Water
lyrics.content:
Ahh…

I've been fading into grey
Trying to be someone
Trying to please someone

I've been painting bitter blue
Always hitting walls
Always trying to break the fall

I'm not perfect
But I'm A ok
Chasing off the clouds
I lock the blues away
I lock the pain away

I can't get enough of your love
I can't get you out of my heart
I can't get enough of your love
'Cause i-i-i-I

Feel like I can walk on water
On water, On water
And now i'm gonna walk on
Water, On water, On water
Feels like I can walk on water

I've been trying hard to hear
What my heart wants to say
Letting it lead the way

I'm not perfect
But I'm A ok
Chasing off the clouds
I lock the blues away
I lock the pain away

I can't get enough of your love
I can't get you out of my heart
I can't get enough of your love
'Cause i-i-i-I

Feel like I can walk on water
On water , On water
And now i'm gonna walk on

Ooh ooh ooh
All I wanna do is
Ooh ooh ooh
Keep walking on water
Ooh ooh ooh
All I wanna do is
Walk on water

Ooh

I can't get enough of your love
'Cauѕe i- i-i-I

Feel like I can walk on water
On water, On water
And now i'm gonna walk on
Water On water on water
Feel like I can walk on wаter

lyrics.title: Nimxi fuq l-Ilma
lyrics.content:
Ahh…

Kont qed nisfuma fil-griż
Nipprova nkun xi ħadd
Nipprova nogħġob lil xi ħadd

Kont qed nitkaħħal
Dejjem naħbat mal-ħitan
Dejjem nipprova nwaqqaf il-waqgħa

Jien mhux perfetta
Imma jien A ok
Niġri wara s-sħab
Inwarrab il-kħaħal lil hemm
Inwarrab l-uġigħ lil hemm

Ma nistax nieħu aktar minn imħabbtek
Ma nistax ineħħik minn qalbi
Ma nistax nieħu aktar minn imħabbtek
Minħabba li ji-ji-ji-jien

Inħossni li nista' nimxi fuq l-ilma
Fuq l-ilma, Fuq l-ilma
U issa se nimxi fuq
L-ilma, Fuq l-iIma, Fuq l-ilma
Inħossni li nista' nimxi fuq l-ilma

Ipprovajt ħafna biex nisma'
Qalbi x'tixtieq tgħidli
Ħallejta tmexxi t-triq

Jien mhux perfetta
Imma jien A ok
Niġri wara s-sħab
Inwarrab il-kħaħal lil hemm
Inwarrab l-uġigħ lil hemm

Ma nistax nieħu aktar minn imħabbtek
Ma nistax ineħħik minn qalbi
Ma nistax nieħu aktar minn imħabbtek
Minħabba li ji-ji-ji-jien

Inħossni li nista' nimxi fuq l-ilma
Fuq l-ilma, Fuq l-ilma
U issa se nimxi fuq

Ooh ooh ooh
Kull ma nixtieq nagħmel din
Ooh ooh ooh
Nibqa' nimxi fuq l-ilma
Ooh ooh ooh
Kull ma nixtieq nagħmel din
Nimxi fuq l-ilma

Ooh

Ma nistax nieħu aktar minn imħabbtek
Minħabb li ji-ji-Jien

Inħossni li nista' nimxi fuq l-ilma
Fuq l-ilma, Fuq l-ilma
U issa se nimxi fuq
L-ilma Fuq l-ilma fuq l-ilma
Inħossni li niѕta nimxi fuq l-ilmа
